title: Magically Garlicky Canadian Haddock Skewers
description: A garlicky and crunchy Canadian dish featuring haddock, cooked to perfection in a wok with a hint of wok-hei, served in a banana leaf vessel, this recipe is vegetarian friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over high heat until it reaches 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, lemon juice, brown sugar, minced garlic, salt, and pepper to make the marinade
Add the haddock pieces to the marinade and mix well to coat
Thread the marinated haddock pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Brush the banana leaves with olive oil and place a skewer in the center of each leaf
Fold the banana leaves over the skewers to form a packet and secure with a toothpick if needed
Add a small amount of oil to the preheated wok and swirl it around to coat the bottom
Place the banana leaf packets in the wok and cook for 4 minutes on each side, or until the haddock is cooked through and the leaves are slightly charred
Remove the packets from the wok and garnish with chopped scallions
